Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Strings of Shadow]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Strings of Shadow is a central technique from the Path of the Chainkeeper.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Strings of Shadow is a technique used by Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Strings of Shadow can grab targets by the arms and shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Strings of Shadow was the first technique Mercy mastered.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — String of Shadow is a technique that Mercy can forge into a rigid arrow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy's arrows are made from solidified Strings of Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Strings of Shadow is a technique used to pull oneself or others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Mercy extends a String of Shadow.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Strings of Shadow are dark tendrils that can snatch up targets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Strings of Shadow is a technique used to tie down a Titan.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Strings of Shadow is a technique that uses strands of Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Strings of Shadow can be enhanced with soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Strings of Shadow were lashing Mercy to the ceiling.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — A String of Shadow grabbed a small stone from Mercy's void key.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Strings of Shadow is used for propulsion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy's Strings of Shadow techniques were destroyed when she tried to Forge them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Malice used Strings of Shadow to grab Mercy and slam her to the floor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Mercy used Strings of Shadow to tie up an obsidian butterfly construct.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Strings of Shadow can erupt from Mercy in a city-sized web.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Strings of Shadow is a dome-like technique used to protect people.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
